# Source Exports

Put database exports and lightly cleaned source-derived tables here.

Recommended naming:

```text
YYYYMMDD_chembl_target_fks1_activity_export.csv
YYYYMMDD_pubchem_echinocandin_structures.sdf
YYYYMMDD_bindingdb_glucan_synthase_search.tsv
YYYYMMDD_pubmed_manual_seed_compounds.csv
```

Every export should have a short note in `source_notes/`.
